scope_note: This v1 artifact fixes checklist-to-registry mapping only. HONG-23 rollup policy is out of scope.

mapping_rule_dictionary.checklist_item_id: Stable checklist identifier from the governance card.
mapping_rule_dictionary.registry_id: Stable registry identifier governed by stage_registry.v1.json.
mapping_rule_dictionary.item_id: Stable item identifier used by downstream governance consumers.
mapping_rule_dictionary.stage_id: Stage prefix that must align with checklist_item_id, registry_id, item_id, and parent_id when present.
mapping_rule_dictionary.layer: Layer value inherited from stage_registry.v1.json vocabulary.
mapping_rule_dictionary.owner_plane: Owner plane inherited from stage_registry.v1.json vocabulary.
mapping_rule_dictionary.parent_id: Single structural parent item_id; null when the item is a parent/root.
mapping_rule_dictionary.next_action_ref: Single next action reference; may point to a downstream item_id or be null.
mapping_rule_dictionary.blocked_by_ref: List of blocking item_ids within the same mapping baseline.

top_action_semantics: Top1 and Top2 priority are not encoded as parent-child hierarchy and are intentionally excluded from this mapping artifact.
